polymarket.title: Will Ethereum dip to $1,500 by December 31, 2026?

polymarket_summary.summary:
We need to produce exactly one paragraph, starting with Bullish:, Bearish:, or Mixed:. Summarize overall market sentiment based on the data: only one prediction: Ethereum dip to $1,500 by Dec 31 2026: Yes 38% (vol $261,094). So 38% think yes (dip), implying 62% think no (won't dip). So sentiment is somewhat bullish (more think it won't dip). So we start with Bullish: then mention that 38% expect dip, 62% expect no dip, volume $261k. Must be max 80 words. One paragraph. Let's craft ~40 words.

"Bullish: The market shows confidence that Ethereum will stay above $1,500 by end‑2026, with 62% of participants betting against a dip (implied from the 38% 'Yes' side) and a modest trading volume of $261,094 on the prediction market."
